title: Susie Steps Out
writer: Elwood Ullman, Reginald Le Borg, Kurt Neumann
actors: David Bruce, Cleatus Caldwell, Nita Hunter
plot: When her father, Papa Russell (Percival Vivian), loses his job because of illness, adolescent Susie Russell (played by newcomer and top-billed Nita Hunter) poses as older than she is in order to get a job singing in a night club. ...
